creator: gjvc@gjvc.com
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	/usr/ports/sysutils/p5-Unix-Lsof
#	/usr/ports/sysutils/p5-Unix-Lsof/Makefile
#	/usr/ports/sysutils/p5-Unix-Lsof/pkg-plist
#	/usr/ports/sysutils/p5-Unix-Lsof/pkg-descr
#	/usr/ports/sysutils/p5-Unix-Lsof/distinfo
#
echo c - /usr/ports/sysutils/p5-Unix-Lsof
mkdir -p /usr/ports/sysutils/p5-Unix-Lsof > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/sysutils/p5-Unix-Lsof/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/sysutils/p5-Unix-Lsof/Makefile << '6de17605f1266edfeece9b7edeabf03d'
X#
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=           Unix-Lsof
XPORTVERSION=        0.0.5
XDISTVERSIONPREFIX=  v
XCATEGORIES=         sysutils
XMASTER_SITES=       CPAN
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=      p5-
X
XMAINTAINER=         gjvc@gjvc.com
XCOMMENT=            Unix::Lsof -- a wrapper to the Unix lsof utility
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=      ${SITE_PERL}/IPC/Run3.pm:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-IPC-Run3
XRUN_DEPENDS=        ${BUILD_DEPENDS}
X
XPERL_CONFIGURE=     yes
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
6de17605f1266edfeece9b7edeabf03d
echo x - /usr/ports/sysutils/p5-Unix-Lsof/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/sysutils/p5-Unix-Lsof/pkg-plist << 'e753d5f2e884bd0a1b25cbba1e9d3441'
e753d5f2e884bd0a1b25cbba1e9d3441
echo x - /usr/ports/sysutils/p5-Unix-Lsof/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/sysutils/p5-Unix-Lsof/pkg-descr << '06697937a90afb1c32377265b0d4a1ae'
X
XThis is a port of Unix::Lsof, a perl wrapper around the UNIX lsof command
X
XWWW: http://search.cpan.org/~marcb/Unix-Lsof-v0.0.5/lib/Unix/Lsof.pm
06697937a90afb1c32377265b0d4a1ae
echo x - /usr/ports/sysutils/p5-Unix-Lsof/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/sysutils/p5-Unix-Lsof/distinfo << '9f629263d2b88db94d03c8c84ece6c11'
